spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_containers_running")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] == "${server}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time, n_containers_running
FROM
  docker
WHERE
  "host" = '$server'
  AND "engine_host" = '$server'
  AND time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo
ORDER BY
  time DESC

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["cpu"] == "cpu-total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r.container_name}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(usage_percent) AS value,
  container_name AS field
FROM "docker_container_cpu"
WHERE
  "cpu" = 'cpu-total'
  AND "host" = '$server'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), container_name
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(usage) AS value,
  container_name AS field
FROM "docker_container_mem"
WHERE
  "cpu" = 'cpu-total'
  AND "host" = '$server'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), container_name
ORDER BY time
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(usage) AS value,
  container_name AS field
FROM "docker_container_mem"
WHERE
  "host" = '$server'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), container_name
ORDER BY time

spec.query: SELECT difference(mean("nread")) AS "Data Read" FROM "zfs_pool" WHERE ("pool" =~ /^$zfs_pool$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(nread) - LAG(AVG(nread)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)) AS value,
  'tank Data Read' AS field
FROM "zfs_pool"
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell'
  AND "pool" = 'tank'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(nwritten) - LAG(AVG(nwritten)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)) AS value,
  'tank Data Write' AS field
FROM "zfs_pool"
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell'
  AND "pool" = 'tank'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "uptime_format")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Uptime"}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  uptime_format AS "Uptime"
FROM system
WHERE
  host = '$server'
  AND time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo 
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_cpus")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql: SELECT n_cpus FROM system WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo AND "host" = '$server'

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "used_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["path"] == "/")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r._field}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  used_percent
FROM
  disk
WHERE
  "host" = '$server'
  AND path = '/'
ORDER BY
  time DESC
LIMIT
  1

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "buffered" or r["_field"] == "cached" or r["_field"] == "used")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "${server}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time, buffered, cached, used
FROM
  mem
WHERE
  time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo
ORDER BY
  time

spec.query:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(read_bytes) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Read') AS field
FROM "diskio"
WHERE
  "host" = 'anarion-nas'
  AND "name" IN ('sda3', 'sdb1')
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
ORDER BY time
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  read_bytes - LAG(read_bytes) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY time) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Read') AS field
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
    AVG(read_bytes) AS read_bytes,
    name
  FROM "diskio"
  WHERE
    "host" = 'pve2'
    AND "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  write_bytes - LAG(write_bytes) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY time) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Write') AS field
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
    AVG(write_bytes) AS write_bytes,
    name
  FROM "diskio"
  WHERE
    "host" = 'pve2'
    AND "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  read_bytes - LAG(read_bytes) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY time) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Read') AS field
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
    AVG(read_bytes) AS read_bytes,
    name
  FROM "diskio"
  WHERE
    "host" = 'pve2'
    AND "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
)
ORDER BY time
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  reads - LAG(reads) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY time) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Reads') AS field
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
    AVG(reads) AS reads,
    name
  FROM "diskio"
  WHERE
    "host" = 'pve2'
    AND "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  writes - LAG(writes) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY time) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Writes') AS field
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
    AVG(writes) AS writes,
    name
  FROM "diskio"
  WHERE
    "host" = 'pve2'
    AND "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), name
)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "zfs_pool")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "nread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "pve2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["pool"] == "storage")
  |> difference(nonNegative: false, columns: ["_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r._field}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(reads) - LAG(AVG(reads)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)) AS value,
  'tank read iops' AS field
FROM "zfs_pool"
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell'
  AND "pool" = 'tank'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "diskio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "iops_in_progress")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "anarion-nas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["name"] == "sda3" or r["name"] == "sdb1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time),
  AVG(iops_in_progress) AS value,
  CONCAT(name, ' Reads') AS field
FROM "diskio"
  WHERE

 "name" IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')
    AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time),  name

ORDER BY time
SELECT "iops_in_progress", "time", "name" FROM "diskio" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo AND name IN ('sda', 'sdb', 'sdc', 'nvme0')

  model
ORDER BY
